query: SELECT id, email, displayName, lineUserId, SUBSTRING(password, 1, 30) as password_prefix FROM line_users WHERE email IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, email, displayName, lineUserId, SUBSTRING(password, 1, 30) as password_prefix FROM line_users WHERE email IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
